2262470.name: PlanetS
2262470.description:
Planets is a space-themed open world game that allows the player to explore the mysteries of the universe and various planets.

With a mining system, Craft, flight simulation, pvp, pve, first and third person camera and the possibility of multiplayer guarantee immersion in the game. Each experience within the game will be unique, as the explorer will not have a single path to follow, although there are missions for those who prefer a linear progression experience!

PlanetS graphics use the most modern rendering technologies, with support for recent technologies like DLSS.

You can play alone, on online server, create your own local network or your own server!
2262470.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
